calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Petitioner Air Kham Oy Syhachack present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined through Laosian Interpreter Tek Vaui Chau.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Tiffany Oy Chau.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Petitioner Air Kham Oy Syhachack present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined through Laosian Intepreter Tek V. Chau.
Proof of Publication on file.

Petitioner needs to file amended petition and publish with the changes that Petitioner wants for her new name.
Court ordered matter off calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Reset To May-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
